description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 2 hrs 53 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 57 mins. His WakaTime breakdown was primarily Java (50%), followed by Bash (25%) and Markdown (14%). The activity data shows 4 projects, and there were no GitHub commits, pull requests opened, or new repositories recorded.
